Name: tool_pruning_blade
FlavorText: A simple curved blade for cutting back the gentle Bloom. The Tinker made you one without being asked.

Name: tool_stiller
FlavorText: Hum it against the Bloom and a patch goes briefly dormant, dreaming. The Forager has three names for what it does. None of them is kill.

Name: tool_resonance_hammer
FlavorText: For the animate growths that won't be reasoned with. It does not break them. It settles them. The head is cast from a swallowed home's doorframe.

Name: tool_sealing_spade
FlavorText: Half tool, half key. Cuts, climbs, and seals the managed Bloom. Its haft bears a maker's mark you cannot yet read.

Name: tool_quieting_edge
FlavorText: Forged from a Stillworks part built to help things end gently. The edge remembers a kinder job than tending overgrowth.

Name: tool_long_tool
FlavorText: The finest thing you will make and the one you will use least. In the Hush even the Bloom forgets to grow.

Name: util_field_hook
FlavorText: For gathering gentle Bloom. Take only what you'll use, the Forager says, and cannot recall why it mattered.

Name: util_climb_iron
FlavorText: For the old vertical works. Its grip is worn smooth by hands that climbed here long before yours.
